edge_types.name: DEVELOPS
edge_types.description: Indicates that an entity develops or creates a technology, tool, or product.

edge_types.name: REPORTS_ON
edge_types.description: Indicates that an entity reports on or covers news, trends, or events related to technology.

edge_types.name: REGULATES
edge_types.description: Indicates that an entity regulates, oversees, or sets policies for technology or related areas.

edge_types.name: RESEARCHES
edge_types.description: Indicates that an entity conducts research or studies on technology topics.

edge_types.name: ANALYZES
edge_types.description: Indicates that an entity analyzes trends, markets, or adoption of technology.

edge_types.name: USES
edge_types.description: Indicates that an entity uses or adopts a technology, tool, or service.

edge_types.name: ADVOCATES_FOR
edge_types.description: Indicates that an entity advocates for or supports a cause, such as privacy or tech standards.

edge_types.name: COLLABORATES_WITH
edge_types.description: Indicates that entities work together on projects, research, or initiatives.

edge_types.name: COMMENTS_ON
edge_types.description: Indicates that an entity comments on or discusses topics related to technology or trends.

analysis_summary: 文本内容聚焦于GraphRAG技术的发展趋势，涉及技术验证、自动化能力、隐私保护、政策协调等议题。实体类型设计基于文本中出现的角色，如技术公司、研究团队、政府机构、媒体、学术机构、行业分析师、开发者、用户群体，并包含Person和Organization作为兜底类型。关系类型反映了社交媒体舆论模拟中的互动，如开发、报道、监管、研究、分析、使用、倡导、合作和评论。
